name: Internship Template
subject: Application for {role} Internship at {company}
body:
Hello {company} Team,

My name is {your_name}, and I am currently exploring opportunities to apply my technical skills in a real-world environment. I am writing to express my interest in the {role} internship position at {company}.

I have been actively developing projects using {skills}, and I am currently working on {why}. Through these experiences, I have gained practical exposure to building and solving real problems with technology.

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to learn from your team and contribute wherever possible.

Please find my resume attached for your reference. I would be grateful for the opportunity to discuss how I could contribute to your team.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
{your_name}

name: Developer Role Template
subject: Application for {role} Position at {company}
body:
Hi {company} Team,

My name is {your_name}, and I am reaching out to express my interest in the {role} position at {company}.

I have strong experience working with {skills}, and I have developed multiple real-world projects including {why}. Through these projects, I have focused on building scalable solutions, writing clean code, and solving practical problems.

I am very interested in contributing my technical skills and learning from the talented engineers at {company}.

I have attached my resume for your review and would be happy to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
{your_name}

name: Research Opportunity Template
subject: Research Collaboration Inquiry – {role}
body:
Respected {company},

My name is {your_name}, and I am writing to express my interest in potential research opportunities related to {role}.

I have been actively developing skills in {skills} and working on projects such as {why}. My primary interest lies in exploring innovative applications of technology and contributing to meaningful research.

I greatly admire the work being done by your group and would be honored to assist or collaborate in any ongoing or upcoming research initiatives.

Please let me know if there might be an opportunity to contribute or learn under your guidance.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
{your_name}

name: Startup Friendly Template
subject: Excited About What {company} Is Building
body:
Hello {company} Team,

My name is {your_name}, and I recently came across {company}. I was really impressed by what your team is building.

I specialize in {skills}, and I am currently working on projects such as {why}. I enjoy building products, experimenting with new ideas, and solving real-world problems through technology.

If there is an opportunity to contribute as a {role}, I would love to support your team and help move the product forward.

I have attached my resume and would be happy to connect if this aligns with your needs.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
{your_name}

name: Follow-Up Template
subject: Following Up on My {role} Application
body:
Hello {company} Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I wanted to kindly follow up regarding my previous message about the {role} opportunity at {company}. I remain very interested in contributing my experience in {skills} and continuing to work on projects like {why}.

I completely understand that you may have a busy schedule, but I would greatly appreciate any update regarding the opportunity.

Thank you again for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
{your_name}
